cards.title: NETWORK ARCHITECTURE
cards.content:
### **Subnet: 10.1.3.0/24**
**Domain:** `wyantswalk.int` | **Gateway:** `10.1.3.1`

#### **Core Nodes**
*   **Talonhub (10.1.3.12):** Debian + Docker. Pi-hole & Wyoming Stack.
*   **Shelae (10.1.3.11):** Raspberry Pi 4. HAOS Appliance. Root access via `id_ed25519`.
*   **Copernicus (10.1.3.13):** High-performance utility server. Hosts the **iCharger MPPT Polling Service** (Port 8081).

#### **Voice & AI Pipeline**
*   **Orchestration:** `universal-router` (Local-First). Routes via Resident Switchboard (Port 8002) and Expert Brain (Port 8001).
*   **STT/TTS:** Whisper/Piper (Offloaded to Talonhub).

cards.title: ENERGY MONITORING (EPS)
cards.content:
### **iCharger MPPT 48100 Integration**
Reverse-engineered Modbus RTU polling via Copernicus (10.1.3.13:8081). 

### **Green Power Logic**
*   **Live:** `sensor.green_power_live` (W) - Sum of Solar + Smart Plug.
*   **SoC:** Custom 16S 48V LiFePO4 voltage curve interpolation.
*   **LTS:** All sensors configured with `state_class` for infinite hourly retention.

### **Automations**
*   **Excess Solar:** 2200W trigger (on) / 300W (off) for Living Room load management.
*   **Fault Alerts:** Persistent notifications for controller errors and low battery (<48V).

cards.title: UI & DASHBOARDS
cards.content:
### **LCARS 2.2 "Solar Sentinel"**
*   **Tactical Command:** Real-time MPPT diagnostics with glassmorphism chips.
*   **Energy Analytics:** 
    *   **Plotly:** 24h Live Power Comparison.
    *   **ApexCharts:** 14d Accumulation (Fixed y-axis title validation).
*   **Styling:** `card_mod` glassmorphism (rgba 0.85, 25px blur).

cards.title: COPERNICUS STACK & CRYPTO MINING
cards.content:
### **Solar-Powered Crypto Mining**
*   **CPU (i9-12900K):** XMR mining (~11-12 KH/s).
*   **GPU (RTX 4060):** KawPow to Unmineable (XMR conversion).

### **Copernicus Server Stack (10.1.3.13)**
*   **iCharger API:** Port `8081` (REST ingestion).
*   **Monero Node:** Port `18081`.
*   **Jellyfin:** Port `8096`.
*   **EmulatorJS:** Port `3000`/`3001`.

cards.title: SYSTEM MAINTENANCE
cards.content:
### **Data Integrity**
*   **LTS Compliance:** Audited all energy sensors for `state_class` measurement/total_increasing.
*   **Version Control:** `mwyant/icharger-mppt-rs485` (GitHub).
*   **Deployment:** Automated via SSH/SCP bridge to `shelae`.
